[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0000000000 a
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000000 a
6 0001010010 3
7 0001010010 3

01 0000000010 1
12 1000100001 3
23 0001010000 2
34 1110100000 4

67 0010000100 2
70 1000000000 1

24 0000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5
